name: matter-cameras
description: Bridge RTSP/ONVIF streams to Matter 1.5 cameras for SmartThings

scripts.deploy: node scripts/bump-deploy-version.mjs && npm run build && bash scripts/deploy.sh --no-bump
scripts.quick-deploy: node scripts/bump-deploy-version.mjs && npm run build && bash scripts/quick-deploy.sh --no-bump
scripts.test: node --import tsx src/streaming/imageTransform.test.ts && node --import tsx src/streaming/resolveOnvifTarget.test.ts && node --import tsx src/utils/redactRtspUrl.test.ts && node --import tsx src/onvif/parseOnvifMotionEvent.test.ts && node --import tsx src/motion/suggestMotionProvider.test.ts && node --import tsx src/motion/resolveMotionProvider.test.ts && node --import tsx src/cameraProviders/buildProtectRtsp.test.ts

author: patricktd
